title: Fix case-sensitive nupkg path + move docs workflow to docs repo
body:
## Summary

### 1. Move docs workflow to `mono/SkiaSharp-API-docs`

The `update-docs.yml` workflow now lives entirely in the docs repo where `GITHUB_TOKEN` has native write access — no PATs or deploy keys needed. It checks out this repo at a configurable `skiasharp-branch` (default: `main`) to get the Cake build scripts.

### 2. Case-sensitive nupkg path fix

`UpdateDocs.cake` used `.ToLower()` for nupkg filenames, but actual files are PascalCase. Works on macOS (case-insensitive), fails on Linux/Windows (case-sensitive).

## Changes

- `.github/workflows/update-docs.yml`: **Removed** (now in docs repo)
- `documentation/writing-docs.md`: Updated pipeline section to reference docs repo workflow
- `scripts/cake/UpdateDocs.cake`: Remove `.ToLower()` from nupkg path

## Related

- mono/SkiaSharp-API-docs#63 (the workflow in the docs repo)
